address: Coventry University, Priory Street, Coventry, CV1 5FB, United Kingdom
all_intakes_available: September 2026 November 2026 January 2027 March 2027 May 2027 July 2027
indian_regional_institution_restrictions: students from the following universities will be considered with 55% in a three year undergraduate degree (unless applying for School of Health and Care courses): Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, Chennai (Madras), Anna, Amity, Andhra Pradesh, Aligarh Muslim, Pune, Bangalore and JNTU
class_12_boards_accepted: Central boards, Maharashtra, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, Kerala, Uttarakhand
english_waiver_class12: 65% in Standard XII English language from certain examination boards only (Central boards, Maharashtra, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, Kerala and Uttarakhand) OR IELTS 6
english_waiver_moi: Students who have studied English at Upper Secondary Level to at least Year 10 and have obtained grade 4 or above in English in the Vitnemål can be exempt from IELTS.
